title: How to remove extra spaces from text
task: Strip leading, trailing, and repeated internal spaces so text is clean and comparable.

excel.note: Removes leading/trailing spaces and collapses internal runs to one.

explanation: TRIM removes every space from the start and end, and reduces any run of spaces between words to a single space. '  hello   world  ' becomes 'hello world'. Combine with CLEAN() to also strip non-printing characters.
